generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in the physical building to monitor temperature environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in the physical building to monitor humidity levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in the physical building to monitor light levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance RuntimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime sensor data collected from environmental sensors in the building"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance MiddlewareConfigurations : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model enriched with device-specific metadata for sensors, actuators, and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for authoring and validating BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data ingestion platform for real-time sensor data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalyticsEnergyOptimization
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for device metadata and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, OperationalScenarioSimulation
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for interactive building simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance BIMModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for validating BIM models during the twinning process"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelValidationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for environmental conditions and operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringDataInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive analytics to optimize energy consumption and improve indoor environmental quality"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight, IndoorEnvironmentalQualityImprovementInsight
]

instance OperationalScenarioSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating operational scenarios to evaluate building responses"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for reducing energy consumption through predictive analytics"
]

instance IndoorEnvironmentalQualityImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improving indoor environmental quality via optimization"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data insight for environmental conditions"
]

instance ScenarioSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from operational scenario simulations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualized through 3D interactive models"
]

instance BIMModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight regarding BIM model validity and compliance"
]

instance HeatingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator in Building Control Systems for temperature regulation"
]

instance VentilationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller in Building Control Systems for air flow management"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab case study building infrastructure serving as the physical counterpart"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, HeatingActuator, VentilationController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin, such as HVAC adjustments or lighting commands, sent through Eclipse Ditto to actuate Building Control Systems (BCS) components."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange between physical and virtual components, enabling immediate updates and response."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A model-driven framework integrating BIM as the semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, and Unreal Engine for visualization, with modular services connected via standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design to operation, with the Digital Twin primarily focused on the 'as-operated' phase for real-time monitoring and optimization during building operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the accuracy of synchronization between the physical asset and its virtual representation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange between physical sensors/actuators and the Digital Twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and model-driven engineering practices for semantic integration and interoperability."
]
